host.description: Hostname for external access via Ingress. Leave empty to skip Ingress.

storageClass.description: StorageClass for the managed Postgres PVCs. Leave empty to use cluster default.

name.description: Database name n8n stores its workflows, credentials, and executions in.

password.description: Optional explicit password. When empty, the cozystack postgres chart generates and preserves one via lookup.

size.description: Persistent Volume size for database storage.

encryptionKey.description: Encryption key for n8n credentials at rest. If empty, n8n generates one on first start — but that value is lost on pod recreation, breaking every stored credential. Set this explicitly in production.

replicaCount.description: Number of n8n main pods. Usually 1 — multi-replica requires queue mode with sibling Redis.

secretRef.description: Name of a Secret in the app namespace whose key N8N_LICENSE_ACTIVATION_KEY holds the operator's n8n activation key (Embed/Enterprise). Offering n8n as a managed service to third parties requires such an entitlement from n8n.
